message:
🌱 visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools: Unable to copy from Logs (#1879)

* 🌱 Add visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools: Unable to copy from Logs mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools: Unable to copy from Logs mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: change VS Code K8s copy-from-logs status to workaround

This is a VS Code webview limitation, not a fixable bug. The right-click
Copy doesn't work in the log viewer webview. The workaround is to use
Ctrl+C / Cmd+C keyboard shortcut instead.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools-1025-unable-to-copy-from-logs",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools: Unable to copy from Logs",
+    "description": "Unable to copy from Logs. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "workaround",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools installation:\n```bash\nvisual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools version\nvisual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools status 2>&1 | head -20\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools configuration:\nI am unable to copy text from the logs for a pod.  I'm not sure if this is a bug or a feature.  But it is often nice to copy the information for put in either DevOps tasks or bugs."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Unable to copy from Logs",
+        "description": "You're going to love this .\n\nIf I copy from the logs window using right-click > Copy, I see the behaviour  describes - the old clipboard contents remain.\n\nIf I copy from the logs window using Ctrl+C, I see the behaviour _you_ describe - the selected logs are now on the clipboard.\n\nRiddle me that eh.\n\nI am on plain Windows 10 in this case (Docker is running under WSL but the extension environment is all Windows).\n\n Could you try using Ctrl+C and see if that works for you too?\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Unable to copy from Logs is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This is a VS Code webview limitation. The right-click context menu Copy option does not work in the log viewer webview. Workaround: use the Ctrl+C (or Cmd+C on macOS) keyboard shortcut to copy selected text instead of the right-click menu.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools",
+      "sandbox",
+      "orchestration",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/vscode-kubernetes-tools/vscode-kubernetes-tools/issues/1025",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/vscode-kubernetes-tools/vscode-kubernetes-tools"
+    },
+    "reactions": 4,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools installation or development environment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:58:46.124Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
